case_title: ESSEX PORTFOLIO LP VS. MANDI EVERSON ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 210061159) AS TO DEFENDANT EVERSON, MANDI DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
